src: Two women standing close together. The woman on the left has curly hair and a brown shirt, with hands near her face. The woman on the right has brown hair and a striped shirt, smiling.
edit: Two Pixar characters pose joyfully, one with stylized curly hair and pink shirt with large buttons, the other with straight hair in blue, orange, and cream stripes. They have lively gestures against a cartoon-like backdrop.

per_image_non_shared_src.01: The woman on the left is blowing a kiss towards the camera. The woman on the right has her hands against her mouth. Backdrop is a plain white wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.10: Two women face the camera; one has her hands on her cheeks, the other is blowing a kiss. The backdrop is plain.
per_image_non_shared_src.33: Two women facing forward with arms extended, as if dancing, against a white wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.46: The woman on the left is turning slightly, her hair mid-motion. The woman on the right looks towards her. Background is a plain white wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.80: The woman on the left looks down with moving hair, while the woman on the right smiles while running a hand through her hair, in front of a plain white wall.

per_image_non_shared_edit.01: A woman on the left blows a kiss towards the camera, while the woman on the right holds her hands against her mouth. The backdrop is a plain white wall.
per_image_non_shared_edit.10: Two women facing the camera; left one has hands on cheeks, right one is blowing a kiss, plain backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_edit.33: Two women facing forward with extended arms, appearing to dance or sway together, against a simple white wall background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.46: The woman on the left is turning slightly, her hair mid-motion. The woman on the right looks towards her against a plain white wall background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.80: A woman on the left looks down with slightly moving hair, while the woman on the right runs a hand through her hair with a bright smile. Background: plain white wall.
